PSA: For anyone who sees this. Traveling north from Bradenton to Gainesville last night, a normally 2-1/2 hour trip took 7-1/2 hours. If you are evacuating, pls keep that into consideration and probably worse today. You can use the left-hand shoulder of the interstate, but it is not always that hospitable.
